chunks.text: Technical Reports - Richard S. Muller. Stroboscopic Interferometer System for Dynamic MEMS Characterization (M00/18) by M.R. Hart, R.A. Conant, Kam Y. Lau and Richard S. Muller. Etching for Micromachining Processing (M96/37) by K.R. Williams and Richard S. Muller. A Uniform channel IGFET (M79/36) by R.W. Coen and R.S. Muller.

An Evaluation of Vacuum Deposited Metal- Insulator-Piezoelectric Semiconductor (MIPS) Electromechanical Transducers (M166) by J.R. Fiebiger and R.S. Muller. Report of a Visit to European Research Laboratories Active in Solid State Device Research and of the 1964 International Conference on the Physics of Semiconductors in Paris, France (M85) by R.S. Muller. Theoretical Admittance Variation With Frequency In Insulators Having Traps Subject to Charge Injection (M54) by Richard S. Muller.
